mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY ( ANALYZE_HISTORY_ID, SERVER_ID, ANALYZE_TARGET_DATE, SOURCE_FILE_PATH, LAST_ANALYZE_LOG_ID, ANALYZE_STATUS, TOTAL_COUNT, SUCCESS_COUNT, FAIL_COUNT, ERROR_COUNT, WARNING_COUNT, FAIL_REASON, ANALYZE_START_AT, ANALYZE_END_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{analyzeHistoryId}, #{serverId}, #{analyzeTargetDate}, #{sourceFilePath}, #{lastAnalyzeLogId}, #{analyzeStatus}, COALESCE(#{totalCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{successCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{failCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{errorCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{warningCount}, 0), #{failReason}, #{analyzeStartAt}, #{analyzeEndAt}, #{analyzeDate}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY SET ANALYZE_STATUS = #{analyzeStatus}, LAST_ANALYZE_LOG_ID = #{lastAnalyzeLogId}, TOTAL_COUNT = COALESCE(#{totalCount}, 0), SUCCESS_COUNT = COALESCE(#{successCount}, 0), FAIL_COUNT = COALESCE(#{failCount}, 0), ERROR_COUNT = COALESCE(#{errorCount}, 0), WARNING_COUNT = COALESCE(#{warningCount}, 0), FAIL_REASON = #{failReason}, ANALYZE_END_AT = #{analyzeEndAt}, UPDATED_AT = COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE ANALYZE_HISTORY_ID = #{analyzeHistoryId}
